title: FUNWHOLE Gold Mine Building Set with Lights – 658 PCS Western Mining Camp Bricks Kit with Working Minecart, Explosives, Dual-Faced Minifigures & Tunnels – Wild West Brick Set for Adults & Teens
features: 【Classic Gold Rush Adventure Starter Set】 Step into the legendary Gold Rush era with this action-packed entry-level set from the FUNWHOLE Western Series. Inspired by the daring spirit of 1800s prospectors, this compact build features a rugged desert landscape, mining gear, and a lively outdoor camp scene—perfect for storytelling and collecting.

【Immersive Lighting Effects for Western Nights】 Includes four warm-toned LED lights (campfire, torches, lanterns) that cast a flickering glow over your desert base. Watch shadows dance across wanted posters and rocky cliffs, adding cinematic depth to your Wild West display.

【Fully Playable Gold Mining Mechanisms】 Dig, blast, and haul! The set features 3 interactive mechanisms: load ore with a crank-powered minecart, blast rocks with dynamite, and hoist tools using a working crane. A fun and tactile Gold Rush experience for solo or family play.

【Dual-Layer Scene with Hidden Mining Tunnels】 Flip the model to reveal a two-tiered mine interior with secret chambers, collapsed shafts, and golden nuggets waiting to be discovered. Perfect for immersive storytelling, modular display, or stop-motion Western films.

【Minifigures with Personality & Plot Twists】 Includes 3 custom minifigures: a hopeful prospector (from the General Store), a grumpy cook, and a sneaky bandit (from the Sheriff’s Office). Each features dual expressions—from gold-struck awe to outlaw grins—making your desert showdown even more dramatic.
